news.t: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of Bluemonte ETF Suite

overview.description: The Bluemonte Core Bond ETF (BDBT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing primarily in a diversified mix of US investment grade bonds and bond ETFs across varying maturities. The fund aims to provide total return and income BDBT was launched on Jun 20, 2025 and is issued by Bluemonte.

data.title: Exchange Traded Concepts Announces Launch of Bluemonte ETF Suite
data.text: OKLAHOMA CITY , June 25, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Exchange Traded Concepts (ETC), a leader in providing innovative ETF solutions, is delighted to introduce the new lineup of Bluemonte ETFs: Bluemonte Dyna...
